dialogos.texto_en: Hey.\nYou come here right away?
Oh?\nDid you also come to eat ice cream, Uesugi-kun?
Well, that's how it is.\nAfter all, it was recommended by all of you.
And yet, only two of you came.
Yes.\nThe rest said they had a place they were curious about\non the way and went to check it out first.
(Itsuki would be the one who would come here first.\n Nino also seems to like sweets...\n There's a possibility it could be those two.)
So, is the ice cream here that famous?
When it comes to classic Okinawan ice cream,\nthis is the place to go.
Ice cream is probably really popular in Okinawa \nsince it's warm all year round, ya know?
By the way, the selling point\nof this ice cream\nis that it uses locally produced fruits!
Please, take a look!\nAll of them look delicious, don't they?
They have everything from the classic flavors\nto limited-time flavors...
Oh, there are too many flavors to choose from!
Where do they get the locally produced fruits\nthat they advertise?
Passion fruit and\nshikuwasa citrus fruit are some of them.
Yeah, shikuwasa is famous.\nYesterday, Ichika was drinking something with shikuwasa.
If that's the case, can you imagine the taste?
Well, I didn't try it or anything.\nSo, I don't know what it tastes like.
There are more than just fruit flavors,\nbut also salted chinsuko biscuit and sugar cane.
Woah, no way?\nI can't even imagine what that would taste like.
With this many options,\nyou'll surely find a flavor you'll like,\nUesugi-kun.
Why don't you try a variety of them?
What do you mean by 'a variety'?\nHow much are you guys planning on eating?
Let's see.\nI'll have a double%p-2;――
No, with this many different kinds,\nI might go for a triple-scoop.
A three-tier sort of thing?\nRich folk, really...
This much is normal, isn't it?
Well, there are also exclusive goods in Okinawa\nthat you should try.\nYou don't want to regret not doing so.
(If it were Itsuki, she might go for the triple stack.)
(I know Miku likes matcha,\n but...I'm not sure about the others...)
Ah, wait! There's also soft serve and crepes!
Ooohh!\nThe choices just keep increasing.\nThis is quite a challenge.
If you go for a crepe, you can also enjoy fresh fruit.\nThen, I'll have a mango crepe\nwith a double scoop of ice cream!
I'll have a triple-scoop in a cup,\nwith soft serve added, please.
(This is no longer a matter of taste preferences.\n They both ordered way too much...)
What are you gonna choose, Uesugi-kun?
Well, I guess I'll go with this strawberry ice cream.
Mmm, it's delicious! I'll give it five stars for sure!
I must definitely confirm that.\nMay I have a taste of that salted chinsuko?
In that case,\nI'll have a taste of your mango crepe in exchange.
(They both look so delicious.\n Well, they actually taste really good.)
*stare*
Hm?
...Even if you stare, I'm not giving you any.
I-it's not like I want it or anything!
But, that strawberry flavor looks delicious too...
It's hard to eat while being stared at like that.
I'm still curious.\nI'm gonna buy that strawberry ice cream as well.
You're still gonna eat?!
What? Want some?
H-how could you tell?!
That's because you were looking at the ice cream\nlike it's prey.
...That's not true.\nI wasn't thinking anything like that at all.
...I'm still curious.\nI'm gonna buy that strawberry ice cream as well.
You're still gonna eat?!
If you're so curious, do you want a bite?
Is that alright?!
No, that's alright!\nI can't take it from a man like you,\nit's too improper.
Ah...\nYeah, sorry about that. I just said it\nwithout thinking, like I was teasing you.
I appreciate the gesture.
...I'm still curious.\nI'm gonna buy that strawberry ice cream as well.
You're still gonna eat?!
If you eat too much,\nyour stomach will get cold, you know?
What, why are you lecturing me about that?!
(In the end, this Itsuki bought some strawberry\n ice cream as well, and shared it\n with the other Itsuki.)
(I wonder how much more they ate than I did...)
